title: K-On!! Custom GUI Pack
body: **![K-On!! GUI Pack](https://i.imgur.com/yaIGboa.png)** **Introduction:** This is a GUI-only resource pack inspired by the show "K-On!!". It can be used with other resource packs—just make sure to place it on top. The pack includes custom images for various GUI elements, including the hot bar. The chosen color palette is purple and pink. If you’d like to see other color options like yellow and white in the future, let me know! [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/sBvFjYM.png) - **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/3SFvRPf.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/pBKnWQz.png) - **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/hDD44PH.png) - **Furnace:** ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/42TsfLg.png) - **Shulker Box:** ![Shulker Box](https://i.imgur.com/79bIJRp.png) - **Loom:** ![Loom](https://i.imgur.com/1AzjHVc.png) - **Cartography Table:** ![Cartography Table](https://i.imgur.com/BzGSVoI.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/O5HyaVF.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/frIJfZH.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Beacon Menu](https://i.imgur.com/Qqp00ve.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/yuhr6xD.png) **Community Engagement:** Feel free to join the discussion and suggest new features or color themes in the comments. If you encounter any bugs, please report them, and I’ll address them as soon as possible. **Thank you for your support!**
